sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN name1 WHEN '2' THEN name2 WHEN '3' THEN name3 WHEN '4' THEN name4 END name, width, colname FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND LISTTYPE = #listCode# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

SELECT boardid, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (boardname2 = '' OR boardname2 IS NULL) THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END END boardname, treevieworder, boardlevel, parentboardid, boarddescription, itemexpires, attachsizelimit, replynotify, boardgroupid, alertpostitem, gubun, url, deleteafter, boardno, portlet, onelinereply, boardtreepath, formlocation, formflag, apprflag, apprmailflag, attributeyn, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#

SELECT boardid, accessid, accesslevel, access_, parentboardid, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, reply_fg, delete_fg, inherit_fg, postnotice, boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath# LIMIT 1

SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate < #nowDate#
AND parentwritedate = #parentWriteDate#
AND upperitemidtree > #upperitemidtree#
UNION SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND parentwritedate < #parentWriteDate#
ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.boardid , A.itemid , A.writerid , A.writername , A.writerdeptname , A.writercompanyname , DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance , A.title , A.readcount , A.attachments , A.itemlevel , A.abstract , '0' readflag , A.extensionattribute5 , A.writername2 , A.writerdeptname2 , A.writercompanyname2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.ITEMID) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, A.extensionattribute2 notice, A.notino, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) as gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1'
AND A.apprflag = 'Y' ORDER BY A.parentwritedate, A.writedate DESC
ORDER BY A.notino ASC, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT DISTINCT B.apprflag FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = #boardID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
AND apprflag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND apprflag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardDd# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND apprflag = 'Y'

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(itemid) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND extensionattribute1 = '0' AND extensionattribute2 = '1'

SELECT A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, B.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY)
AND A.writedate < #lastDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND A.writedate < #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND S.USERID = #userID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY))) ORDER BY A.writedate DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.BOARDID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END boardname, A.BOARDNAME2 , TABUSED , B.GUBUN FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (B.COMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (USERID = #userID# OR (USERID = 'everyone' AND A.BOARDID <> '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}')) AND TABUSED = 'Y' ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

SELECT ITEMID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERCOMPANYNAME$lang$ WRITERCOMPANYNAME, WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3$lang$ EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , MAINCONTENT , A.APPRFLAG , B.GUBUN , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.BOARDID , A.DOCNO FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# ) )
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = ReadCount + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #writeDate#, Importance = #importance#, Title = #title#,
Attachments = #hasAttach#,
WriterName = #writerName#, WriterName2 = #writerName2#,
ExtensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2#, ExtensionAttribute5 = #extensionAttribute5#, DocPassWord = #docPassword#, extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6#, extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7#, extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8#, extensionAttribute9 = #extensionAttribute9#, extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10#, content = #content# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.gubun, '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN (SELECT boardid , accessid , access_, tenant_id FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND parentboardid = #rootBoardID# AND access_ = 1 AND write_fg = 'true' AND boardid <> #excludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #userID# OR accessid = #deptID# OR accessid = #companyID# ) ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.COMPANYID) = '' OR A.COMPANYID IS NULL) ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.COMPANYID) = '' OR A.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(AccessID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BoardAdmin_FG = 'true' AND ( AccessID = #userID# OR AccessID = #deptID# OR AccessID = #companyID# OR AccessID = 'everyone' ) AND BoardID = IFNULL(( SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND BoardID = #boardID# ), #boardID#)
SELECT CONCAT(BOARDID, ';') BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #accessID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND UserID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = P.boardid AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND S.USERID = #userID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY)))
WHERE (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #userID# USERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ), ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(VIEWORDER) IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE MAX(VIEWORDER) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ), TENANT_ID, #companyID# FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE USERID = #userID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE USERID = #userID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID# ORDER BY GUID
SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) as deptPathCode FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #departmentID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , MAIN_FLAG FLAG , IMAGENAME FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BoardID = #boardID# ORDER BY WriteDate ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BoardID = #boardID#
SELECT APPRFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND apprFlag = 'C' AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = 0 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT result2 result FROM TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CONCAT(BOARDID, ';') BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #v_PACCESSID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
